title: Container Item
description: The container item type. The only structurally-special type: it groups child instances and arranges them on a CSS-agnostic grid. Children are validated by the dashboard instance schema; the container-only-children rule is enforced by the resolver (E1-S4). The grid is defined by relative-weight track lists (unitless numbers) and a relative gap; child instances are placed with explicit 1-indexed coordinates via their `placement` (see $defs/placement). NO CSS keywords or absolute units appear anywhere. The resolver (E2-S1) normalizes the grid into fractional track sizes and validates placements against the grid bounds, emitting a renderer-agnostic layout block.

constraints.description: The container's relative-weight grid (E3-S2 surface). Editable at runtime: the column track weights, the row track weights, and the inter-track gap — all unitless, relative numbers. Column and row weights are positive-number arrays the resolver normalizes to fractions summing to 1 per axis; gap is a non-negative number in the same relative space. NO CSS units or keywords.

grid.title: Container Grid
grid.description: The container's grid, defined entirely in relative, unitless terms so it is interpretable by a CSS or a native renderer. Track lists are relative weights; the resolver normalizes them to fractions summing to 1 per axis. An axis with no track list is a single implicit full-size track.

columns.title: Column Track Weights
columns.description: Relative, unitless weights for the column tracks, in left-to-right order. Each weight is a positive number; the resolver normalizes the list to fractions that sum to 1. Omit for a single full-width column. NO CSS units or keywords.

rows.title: Row Track Weights
rows.description: Relative, unitless weights for the row tracks, in top-to-bottom order. Each weight is a positive number; the resolver normalizes the list to fractions that sum to 1. Omit for a single full-height row. NO CSS units or keywords.

gap.title: Track Gap
gap.description: Relative, unitless gap between tracks, expressed in the same relative space as the track weights. Defaults to 0 (no gap). NO CSS units or keywords.

placement.title: Grid Placement
placement.description: Explicit, 1-indexed placement of a child instance within its parent container's grid. Authored on a child instance's `placement` object and interpreted by the parent container (E2-S1). The resolver fails fast (LAYOUT_PLACEMENT_INVALID / LAYOUT_PLACEMENT_OUT_OF_BOUNDS) when spans are non-positive or the placed range exceeds the grid bounds. Missing colStart/rowStart default to 1; missing colSpan/rowSpan default to 1.

colSpan.description: Number of column tracks to span. Positive; defaults to 1.

rowSpan.description: Number of row tracks to span. Positive; defaults to 1.
